scripts.lint:all: echo '⚠️  Linting all components is slow. Use component build.sh instead.' && eslint 'components/**/*.ts' --max-warnings 0
scripts.lint:fix:all: echo '⚠️  Fixing all components is slow. Use component build.sh instead.' && eslint 'components/**/*.ts' --fix
scripts.lint:component: echo 'Usage: npm run lint:component -- components/ONCE/0.3.20.2' && exit 1
